faq.metaTitle: FAQ about the dollar and exchange rates in Uruguay
faq.metaDescription: Clear answers about today's US dollar, euro, real and Argentine peso rates in Uruguay: where to buy, where to sell, spreads and how to choose an exchange house. Updated every 10 minutes.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.intro: Answers to the most common questions about exchange rates in Uruguay, with real-time data from over 40 exchange houses.

pillar.aboutTitle: Everything About the Dollar Exchange Rate in Uruguay
pillar.aboutDescription: The US dollar is the most traded currency in Uruguay. Its exchange rate directly impacts the country's economy, from import prices to family savings. At Cambio Uruguay, we offer you the most comprehensive tool to track exchange rates in real time.
pillar.howToCompareTitle: How to Compare Exchange Rates Smartly?
pillar.howToCompareDescription: Not all exchange houses offer the same rate. The difference between the best and worst can mean significant savings, especially for large amounts. Our platform automatically compares more than 40 exchange houses to show you where to get the best deal.
pillar.marketOverviewTitle: Overview of the Uruguayan Currency Market
pillar.marketOverviewDescription: Uruguay has a diverse and competitive currency market, regulated by the Central Bank of Uruguay (BCU). With more than 40 active exchange houses, public and private banks, and digital platforms like eBROU and Prex, Uruguayans have multiple options for exchanging currencies.
pillar.tipsTitle: Tips for Getting the Best Exchange Rate
pillar.tip1: Always compare before exchanging: the difference between houses can be significant
pillar.tip2: Digital platforms like eBROU usually offer preferential exchange rates
pillar.tip3: Avoid exchanging at airports or tourist areas where rates are less favorable
pillar.tip4: For large amounts, negotiate directly with the exchange house for a better rate
pillar.branchesLink: Find exchange house branches near you
pillar.advancedLink: Use the advanced comparator with detailed filters

guias.h1: Guides on the dollar and currency exchange in Uruguay
guias.intro: Clear, practical guides to understand Uruguay's currency market: how to buy dollars at the best price, what the different quote types mean, and when it's best to exchange currency.
guias.metaTitle: Guides on the dollar and exchange houses in Uruguay | Cambio Uruguay
guias.metaDescription: Practical guides to buy dollars at the best price in Uruguay, understand BILLETE, CABLE and TRANSFERENCIA, and pick the best time to exchange currency. Data from over 40 exchange houses.
guias.ctaText: Compare the dollar rate across more than 40 exchange houses and decide with data, not hunches.

acerca.h1: About Cambio Uruguay: methodology and sources
acerca.intro: How we work, where the data comes from, and who is behind Uruguay's dollar rate comparator.
acerca.metaTitle: About Cambio Uruguay: methodology, sources and team | Cambio Uruguay
acerca.metaDescription: Learn the methodology of Cambio Uruguay: data from the Central Bank of Uruguay (BCU) and over 40 exchange houses, updated roughly every 10 minutes. Independent, free and transparent.
acerca.typeBillete: BILLETE: cash dollars, the physical bills you withdraw or hand over at the exchange house.
acerca.typeCable: CABLE: dollars transferred to or from abroad; applies to international operations.
acerca.typeTransferencia: TRANSFERENCIA: dollars moved electronically between accounts, without handling cash.
acerca.typeInterbancario: INTERBANCARIO: wholesale rate between banks; a market reference, not a price for the public.
acerca.interbankNote: The INTERBANCARIO type is a wholesale reference between banks. It is not a price the public can buy or sell at: for your real operations, look at BILLETE, CABLE or TRANSFERENCIA.
acerca.disclaimerText: The information on Cambio Uruguay is informational and educational. It does not constitute financial, tax or investment advice, nor a recommendation to buy or sell currency. Always verify the rate and conditions directly with the exchange house before operating.
acerca.ctaText: Check the dollar rate across more than 40 exchange houses, or dig deeper with our guides.
